news-korea-econ.title: Trump slaps up to 100% tariff on some brand-name drug imports in major America First push
news-korea-econ.description: President Trump unveiled a tiered tariff plan hitting some imported drugs with rates up to 100%, aiming to boost U.S. manufacturing and reduce reliance on foreign supply chains.

news-korea-econ.title: Breitbart Business Digest: The Vindication of Liberation Day
news-korea-econ.description:
One year after Liberation Day, with many tariffs only taking full effect mid-year amid heavy front-loading, the policy has delivered measurable results.

news-global-econ.title: Spain out of Starmer-led Group 'Exploring' Ways to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
news-global-econ.description:
Socialist-ruled Spain was excluded from a international virtual summit led by the government of British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer that "discussed" possible joint actions towards reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

news-global-econ.title: REP SETH MOULTON: America deserves better than Trump’s vague Iran war plans
news-global-econ.description: Representative Seth Moulton argues Trump's Wednesday address offered vague promises on Iran with no clear plan to end the war or reopen the Strait.

news-global-econ.title: DOUG SCHOEN: Democratic battle pits moderates vs. progressives for soul of the party
news-global-econ.description: Democrats face a defining intra-party battle between progressives and moderates that could determine their 2028 presidential chances and viability.

news-global-econ.title: Why Trump’s war speech failed: Declaring victory but still bombing Iran back to the ‘Stone Ages’
news-global-econ.description: Trump's address on Iran declared victory but promised weeks more bombing, drawing criticism from pundits, European allies, and voters in a recent poll.

news-global-soc.title: At least 46 children dead amid measles outbreak as virus spreads globally
news-global-soc.description: Measles is spreading globally, as Bangladesh reports dozens of child deaths and the U.S. sees over 1,500 confirmed cases, per health officials.
